<p class="key-answer" data-question="Sitagliptin Hydrochloride 有什麼相關新聞？">

</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Sitagliptin Hydrochloride 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：For adult patients with type 2 diabetes mellitus, Sitagliptin Accord is indicated to improve glycaemic control: as monotherapy:- in patients inadequately controlled by diet and exercise alone and for...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>opsismodysplasia（98.9%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus (disease)（98.7%）</li>
<li>classic stiff person syndrome（98.7%）</li>
<li>focal stiff limb syndrome（98.7%）</li>
<li>thiamine-responsive dysfunction syndrome（98.6%）</li>
<li>drug-induced localized lipodystrophy（98.0%）</li>
<li>pancreatic agenesis（97.9%）</li>
<li>centrifugal lipodystrophy（97.9%）</li>
<li>pressure-induced localized lipoatrophy（97.8%）</li>
<li>idiopathic localized lipodystrophy（97.7%）</li>
<li>autoimmune oophoritis（88.0%）</li>
<li>type 1 diabetes mellitus（86.5%）</li>
<li>cholangiocarcinoma, susceptibility to（65.0%）</li>
<li>hemoglobin C-beta-thalassemia syndrome（62.0%）</li>
<li>homozygous familial hypercholesterolemia（60.5%）</li>
<li>mitral valve prolapse, myxomatous（60.4%）</li>
<li>pancreas, dorsal, agenesis of（58.4%）</li>
<li>familial chronic myelocytic leukemia-like syndrome（58.2%）</li>
<li>woolly hair, autosomal recessive 3（58.1%）</li>
<li>hypercarotenemia and vitamin A deficiency, autosomal recessive（58.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
